---
title: "Visual and auditory cues of predation risk in army-ant following flocks"
image: "../images/card_pics/collared_forest_falcon.jpg"
description: "We assess how mixed-species flocks detect predators using both sight and sound. Experiments along forest gradients reveal how multimodal signals coordinate escape behavior and shape community cohesion."
categories: ["Panama PLUMAS Project", "Project BITE", "Animal Communication & Contest Dynamics"]
contributors: "Marcus Anderson, Rebecca Franke"
feature_order: "d"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
